items.briefing:
A ransomware group known as Inc is actively exploiting unpatched zero-day vulnerabilities in SonicWall Secure Mobile Access (SMA) devices. If your organisation uses SonicWall SMA products for remote access, this is a priority — check with your IT team or provider to confirm patches are applied immediately. Separately, research highlights that AI tools are helping cybercriminals launch ransomware attacks faster than ever, making rapid recovery planning more critical than before.

**Practical tip:** Confirm with your IT support that any SonicWall remote access devices are fully patched and up to date today.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: AI security incidents are already hitting 81% of Australian organisations, making AI threats an urgent priority.
